result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: There is no formal, unified mathematical proof establishing a relationship between Quantum Darwinism (QD) and Holographic Quantum Error Correction (HQEC); the connection currently remains heuristic. However, three key conceptual correspondences have been identified: 1. Redundancy-Subregion Mapping: Environmental fragments in QD correspond to subregions in HQEC. 2. Information Proliferation-Code Subspace: The proliferation of information in QD maps to the properties of the code subspace. 3. Decoherence-Error Correction: Environmental decoherence in QD maps to the error correction mechanisms in HQEC.

JUSTIFICATION: While these mappings link environmental redundancy to holographic error correction properties, the current literature relies on analogies rather than a formal bridge, leaving a significant gap in a unified mathematical framework.
